info.title: Dagpi API
info.description: A powerful and fast API for image manipulation, filters, effects, meme generation, and serving datasets. Provides endpoints for processing images with various effects and retrieving fun data like jokes, facts, and pickup lines.

tags.name: Data
tags.description: Fun data and text generation endpoints

get.description: Apply a pixelation effect to the provided image.

Get the dominant colors from the provided image.
Invert the colors of the provided image.
Apply Sobel edge detection filter to the provided image.
Apply a blur effect to the provided image.
Manipulate the RGB channels of the provided image.
Apply a deep fry effect to the provided image.
Convert the provided image to ASCII art representation.
Apply a charcoal drawing effect to the provided image.
Apply a posterize effect to the provided image.
Apply a sepia tone filter to the provided image.
Apply a polaroid frame effect to the provided image.
Apply an oil paint artistic effect to the provided image.
Convert the provided image to a pencil sketch style.

Place the provided image into a wanted poster template.

Apply prison/jail bars overlay to the provided image.
Generate a delete button meme with the provided image.
Generate a trash meme with the provided image.
Add a fedora hat overlay to the provided image.
Apply a shattered/broken glass effect to the provided image.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username to display on the tweet.

get.description: Generate a fake Discord message image with customizable text and username.
Generate a fake YouTube comment image with customizable text and username.
Generate a captcha-style image selection meme with the provided image.
Generate a retro-style meme with top and bottom text.

parameters.name: top_text
parameters.description: Text for the top of the meme.

parameters.name: bottom_text
parameters.description: Text for the bottom of the meme.

get.description: Generate a modern-style meme with text above the image.
Generate a motivational poster meme with the provided image and text.

get.summary: Create slap meme with two images
get.description: Generate a slap meme using the provided image URL and a second image URL.

parameters.name: url2
parameters.description: URL of the second image for the meme.

get.description: Generate an image showing a person thinking of the provided image.

parameters.name: url2
parameters.description: URL of the second image to place in the thought bubble.

get.description: Get a random Who's That Pokemon challenge with question and answer.
Get a random roast/insult text.
Get a random Yo Mama joke.
Get a random joke.

Get a random Magic 8-Ball style response.
Get a random pickup line.
Get a random news headline. Can be real or fake.
Get a random company/brand logo for guessing games.
Get random anime waifu character data.

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key obtained from the Dagpi dashboard. Pass as 'Authorization: <token>'.

ImageUrl.name: url
ImageUrl.description: URL of the image to process.

colors.description: List of dominant color hex codes.

fake.description: Whether the headline is fake or real.

easy.description: Whether the logo is easy to guess.

BadRequest.description: Bad request - invalid parameters or missing required fields.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key.
